headline: Fifth Third Q2 Earnings Beat on Strong NII & Fee Income, Stock Down
summary: FITB's Q2'26 results benefit from higher NII and fee income. However, shares slip nearly 3.1% in early trading on higher integration-related costs.

headline: TFC Q2 Earnings Beat on Lower Provisions, Stock Dips on NIM Concern

headline: M&T Bank (MTB) Looks Fully Valued After Buyback And Preferred Capital Moves
summary: M&T Bank (MTB) has been in focus after a run of recent capital actions, including a new callable preferred depositary share offering, fresh preferred dividends, and the completion of a US$465 million common share buyback. See our latest analysis for M&T Bank. The recent preferred offering, dividends and completed buyback sit alongside strong share price momentum, with M&T Bank posting a 24.5% year to date share price return and a 130.81% total shareholder return over five years. This suggests...
